---
name: Feature Request
about: Suggest something for Helix
title: "[feat] "
labels: enhancement
assignees: ''
---

## What's the feature?
A clear description of what you want.

## Why does Helix need this?
What problem does it solve?

## How should it work?
Describe the expected behavior or UX.

## Anything else?
Mockups, references, examples.
